package handler

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_handler_uses_action_param_switch_for_many_use_cases.
// Rule intent: A single handler should not branch on action/type/mode query or path params
// to serve many unrelated workflows. Each use case should have its own handler.
// Anti-pattern: switch on c.Query("action") or c.Param("action") with many cases.

type ResourceHandler struct{}

func (h *ResourceHandler) HandleResource(c *gin.Context) {
	action := c.Query("action")

	switch action {
	case "create":
		var req struct {
			Name string `json:"name" binding:"required"`
		}
		if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid payload"})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"id": "res_1", "name": req.Name})

	case "update":
		id := c.Param("id")
		var req struct {
			Name string `json:"name"`
		}
		if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid payload"})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": id, "name": req.Name})

	case "delete":
		id := c.Param("id")
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"deleted": id})

	case "list":
		page := c.DefaultQuery("page", "1")
		size := c.DefaultQuery("size", "20")
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"page": page, "size": size, "items": []string{}})

	case "export":
		format := c.DefaultQuery("format", "csv")
		c.Header("Content-Type", "text/csv")
		c.String(http.StatusOK, "id,name\n1,test")

	case "import":
		file, err := c.FormFile("file")
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing file"})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"imported": file.Filename})

	case "archive":
		ids := c.QueryArray("ids")
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"archived": ids})

	case "restore":
		id := c.Param("id")
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"restored": id})

	default:
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "unknown action: " + action})
	}
}
